name: MagicTowerReset
short_description: Retro RPG game, gameplay includes storyline, numerical calculations, equipment and item acquisition, HD-2D style, CRT TV screen
detailed_description:
亲爱的朋友：

你们好！

我是科技乱流桑，很高兴能为大家带来我的第一款游戏介绍
魔塔重制版是我单人独立制作的复古小游戏
使用了HD-2D的画面风格，游戏内容是年轻的国王为了拯救王后而孤身潜入魔塔的故事
游戏包含了RPG类型的要素，游玩核心是对数值的估计和计算

希望您能玩的开心！
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Dear friends：

Greetings!

I'm SienceBoy,I am pleased to introduce my first game to everyone
The remake of Magic Tower is a retro mini game that I independently created as a single player
Using the HD-2D visual style, the game tells the story of a young king who infiltrates the magic tower alone to save the queen
The game contains elements of RPG genre, and the core of gameplay is the estimation and calculation of numerical values

Hope you have fun!
